name: GODAI TAIGEKI: YONDAN JUTSU (ELEMENTAL BEATDOWN: RANK FOUR TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
This technique works like Godai Taigeki: Shodan Jutsu, except you fire an elemental ray attack, dealing 5d6 damage against a single enemy. This technique has the following variants:

Kazandan Dangan no Jutsu (Volcanic Shot Technique) (Lava) [Lava]: The technique deals lava damage, up to 11d6 and the target catches on fire (Reflex negates).

Rinrin no Jutsu (Hyouton) [Cold]: The technique deals cold damage, up to 11d6 and will stagger the target for 1 round (Fortitude negates).

Kuzure no Jutsu (Doton) [Earth]: The technique deals earth damage, up to 11d6 and the target must make a Fortitude save to avoid being stunned for 1 round (Fortitude negates).

Seidenki no Jutsu (Raiton) [Electric]: The technique deals electricity damage, up to 13d6 and the attack gains an additional +2 circumstance bonus to attack rolls.

Yarienen no Jutsu (Katon) [Fire]: The technique deals fire damage, up to 13d6 and the target catches on fire (Reflex negates).

Suikantsuu no Jutsu (Suiton) [Water]: The technique deals water damage, up to 11d6 and the target will be dazzled for 1 round (Reflex negates).

Suraisufuu no Jutsu (Fuuton) [Wind]: The technique deals wind damage, up to 13d6 and the target will be deafened for 1 round (Fortitude negates).

Effect: Ray

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or the maximum indicated per variant (whichever is lower).
